title: carissa edulis
intro: Carissa edulis, also known as the num-num tree, is a small, evergreen shrub native to southern Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting digestive health. Carissa edulis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
